strengths: ~20 years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput distributed systems
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through founding and sustaining the open-source GISCollective platform over nearly a decade
concerns: AI/ML depth is shallow and very recent (2025-present only), far below the established expertise expected of a Director-level AI strategist
No advanced degree; role prefers Master's or PhD in an AI-related field and the candidate holds only a BS in CS
No evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping product roadmaps at scale, or operating at the executive-stakeholder influence level the role requires
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically credible polyglot engineer with genuine entrepreneurial experience and current exposure to AI tooling, but the role is a Director-level individual contributor position requiring recognized, deep AI expertise, a track record of advising strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption, and the ability to influence at the executive level. His AI involvement is both too recent and too narrowly focused on developer tooling to satisfy the 'recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms' bar, and there is no evidence of the thought leadership or strategic customer-facing work central to this role.
